args.message: Great questions! This Camry has had just one previous owner and was used primarily as a personal vehicle, so it hasn't been subjected to the wear and tear that comes with fleet usage. As for accidents, there are no reported incidents that I've found. It has been regularly maintained, but the last documented service was at 68,500 miles. The oil change might be a touch overdue now, but we’re happy to throw in a complimentary oil change for your peace of mind. I assure you, the car is in solid condition and ready to provide years of dependable service!
